历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 28719 → 28035 → 25918 → 20262 → 13602, showing a continuous and significant upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition), with a cumulative advance of about 15117 places over the past 4 years, and a sharp advance of 6660 places in 2025 compared to 2024, indicating strong upward momentum; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing: 49 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 49 in 2024, 50 in 2025, 51 in 2026, with a slight expansion of 2% in 2026 compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 79–83 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering universities; the 2025 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors attracting attention; the 2026 reputation remains somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 77th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms. Historical admission anomaly signals show that in 2025, the admission scores for popular majors at this university dropped sharply, which may have a lagging psychological impact on the application decisions for that year and the following year; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the strongest discipline of the university; the Xuancheng Campus Physics Category majors are mainly engineering, consistent with the main campus's advantageous discipline system.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Software Engineering are socially hot/recommended, with strong application willingness; majors like Material Forming and Control Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices are clearly discouraged directions; Chongqing's 2026 Physics Category candidates are approximately 137,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), slightly decreasing from 139,500 in 2025, with a small decline in the competition base; Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, not a local university in Chongqing; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), at a medium-low level, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong momentum of continuous and significant upward historical rankings, the slight easing effect of a 2% enrollment expansion in 2026, the possible psychological cooling of applications due to negative reputation, and the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 13602, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to advance slightly but with a narrowed range; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13600, with a range of 13100–14100.

- Software Engineering (Xuancheng Campus)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13100–14100, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Software Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 14000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 Mechanical Engineering, with Tier 3 material majors as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4353 → 4060 → 5392 → 4416 → 5334, showing significant fluctuations with no clear single trend; the 2025 baseline is about 5334, which is 918 places lower than the 2024 ranking of 4416; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing: 6 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 9 in 2025, and planned 8 in 2026, a reduction of 11.1% compared to 2025, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the Soft Science ranking, with a stable level; reputation in 2025 was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors), and remains somewhat negative in 2026 (academic misconduct); moderate popularity on Douyin; few majors offered for History Category, so reputation impact is relatively limited; Management Science and Engineering is rated A-level, but the majors offered for History Category (English, Network and New Media) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.
